title: Hidden Gem
description: A random card without [gold]Replay[/gold] in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] gains [gold]Replay[/gold] +2.
upgraded_description: A random card without [gold]Replay[/gold] in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] gains [gold]Replay[/gold] +3.
notes: Cannot be generated in combat. Selects from Attack/Skill/Power cards preferentially. Filters cards that already have Replay or are unplayable.
